Firefly Corner Farm
Hipcamp Guest Guide — Camp Facilities
Water supply — start here first

The camp water comes from the grey tank next to the stable. Two steps to get it running — do this before using the shower or tap.

  • 1
    Open the main exit valve on the tank — look for the yellow Main Tank Valve label. Valve handle in line with the pipe = open.
  • 2
    Switch on the Water Pump switch — knee height on your right as you walk into the shower entrance.
Please conserve water. We have one tank and rainfall has been low. Use only what you need, and switch the pump off when you're done.
Dry toilet

The dry toilet uses finely chopped straw as a cover material. Waste becomes compost over several months — no water or chemicals needed.

  • 1
    Do your business into the bucket under the seat.
  • 2
    Add cover material from the container to your left — stored under the hinged panel on your left-hand side.
    After a pee: 1 scoop  ·  After a poo: 2 scoops
  • 3
    Glance back to confirm the waste is covered.

When the bucket is nearly full

  • 4
    Lift the entire toilet seat panel to access the bucket — the panel is hinged at the back of the platform, so raise it from the front. Then lift the bucket out and carry it down toward the creek from the Woofer camp.
  • 5
    You will see two compost compounds — the brown one on the left and the green one on the right. Use the green one.
  • 6
    Lift the hinged lid, empty the bucket, close the lid.
Shower

Make sure the water supply is running (steps above) before starting the shower.

Cold shower default

A lovely refreshing cold shower — the tonic of champions.

  • 1
    Inside the shower, find the white camp shower control box on the left wall.
  • 2
    Follow the pale blue hose up to the orange connector at the top. Turn the black switch on the orange connector to start the water flow.

Warm shower optional

  • 1
    Locate the gas bottle at the entrance of the shower cubicle — it sits on a shelf to the left.
  • 2
    Turn the black valve on top of the gas bottle anti-clockwise to open it. The heater activates immediately.
  • 3
    Then turn on the black switch on the orange connector as normal (cold shower step 2).
  • 4
    Please do not adjust the black knob settings on the white shower box — leave them exactly as you find them.
After your shower: close the gas valve (clockwise), turn off the black switch on the orange connector, and switch off the water pump.
Questions? Find James or a Woofer at the farm house.
Firefly Corner Farm — Krambach NSW
